summary: Project skeleton created. v2 archived. All 9 tables migrated. Backend (Python 3.12+, pinned deps), frontend (SvelteKit 2, Node 24, Tailwind CSS 4), and prompts directories ready.
warnings: Node 24.14.0 used (matches v2). Ensure nvm use 24 before frontend commands.
Ported table schemas (github_tokens, linked_repos, repo_file_index, repo_index_meta) match v2 column names and types for Phase 2 porting.

critical_interfaces: app.models.Base is the SQLAlchemy declarative base — import from here
app.config.settings is the singleton Settings instance — all 21 env vars configured
app.config.DATA_DIR and PROMPTS_DIR are the canonical path references
app.main.app is the FastAPI application — add routers here
All prompt templates are placeholders — Phase 1a writes real content
Backend venv at backend/.venv — activate before running Python commands
known_limitations: All prompt templates contain placeholder content — Phase 1a must populate with real prompts
No routers attached to FastAPI app yet
Frontend is bare SvelteKit skeleton — no components, no stores
codebase_guidance=None, codebase_context=None until Phase 2 GitHub integration
